series_metadata.series_description: This is an envelope or jacket containing a copy of appeals from Board of Revisions decisions appealed to the Board of Tax Appeals. Complaints filed under R.C. 5715.19 and 5715.27 involving valuation assessment and liability of real property.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Held in Department files for one year after final action then to records 6 years after final action on the appeal or 6 years after final court action under pertinent provisions of R.C. 5715.02, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Held in Department files for one year after final action then to records 6 years after final action on the appeal or 6 years after final court action under pertinent provisions of R.C. 5715.02, then delete., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
